items.briefing:
Australian organisations should be aware of two critical vulnerabilities being actively exploited right now. The Qilin ransomware gang is targeting a serious flaw in Palo Alto VPN systems, so if your organisation uses this technology, patches should be applied immediately. Separately, attackers are exploiting critical flaws in the wp2shell WordPress plugin to install malicious code on websites — any WordPress site using this plugin needs urgent attention. Apple has also patched a vulnerability in its Hide My Email feature, so ensure your Apple devices are updated.

A broader report highlights rising cyber threats across the Asia-Pacific region, driven by AI-enabled attacks and geopolitical tensions — a timely reminder for all Australian staff to stay alert. **Practical tip:** Check with your IT team today whether your VPN software and WordPress plugins are fully up to date — these are the most common entry points for attackers right now.

featured.title: Critical Palo Alto VPN bug now exploited by Qilin ransomware gang - BleepingComputer
featured.quote: Critical infrastructure vulnerability actively exploited by ransomware gang poses immediate threat to Australian organizations.
